results.description: Count Python lines in tests/test_statistical and tests/unit.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
line_total = 0
file_total = 0
for d in [Path("tests/test_statistical"), Path("tests/unit")]:
    for p in d.rglob("*.py"):
        file_total += 1
        line_total += sum(1 for _ in p.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
print(f"SIBLING_TEST_FILES={file_total}")
print(f"SIBLING_TEST_LINES={line_total}")
if line_total > 3500:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
